title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero, VP of Engineering at Cursor, discusses how agentic workflows can break through the 40% productivity plateau that many companies experience with AI coding assistants. He describes agent systems Cursor has deployed across the full SDLC including bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and PM/EM support, plus organizational shifts needed to operate at agent scale.
